product: Integrated Homes Gadget Pack: 1.5kva 12v Solar Inverter
name: Integrated Homes Gadget Pack: 1.5kva 12v Solar Inverter
description: This essential solar power pack includes a 1.5kVA 12V inverter, designed to keep your lights, fans, phones, and laptops running during power outages. It's the perfect entry-level solution for reliable, clean energy for your home.
meta_title: Integrated Homes Gadget Pack: 1.5kva 12v Solar Inverter

product: Family Power Security Pack: 2.5kva 12v Solar Inverter
name: Family Power Security Pack: 2.5kva 12v Solar Inverter
description: Power more of your home with this 2.5kVA 12V solar inverter system. Ideal for running multiple lights, fans, TVs, and decoders simultaneously. A robust solution for family comfort during load shedding.
meta_title: Family Power Security Pack: 2.5kva 12v Solar Inverter

name: Essential Premium Power packs 3.5kva 48v Hybrid
description: Experience next-level efficiency with this 3.5kVA 48V Hybrid Solar Inverter. It intelligently manages solar power, battery, and grid to power heavy loads like fridges and freezers, ensuring maximum energy savings.

product: SUPER HOME PREMIUM PACK 5kva 48v Hybrid Solar Inverter
name: SUPER HOME PREMIUM PACK 5kva 48v Hybrid Solar Inverter
description: The ultimate home solution. This 5kVA 48V Hybrid system powers multiple heavy appliances including inverter ACs, water pumps, and kitchen electronics. Enjoy whole-home comfort, even without the grid.
meta_title: SUPER HOME PREMIUM PACK 5kva 48v Hybrid Solar Inverter

product: CLASSIC BUSINESS PREMIUM INSTALLATION 7.5kva 48v Hybride Solar Inverter

product: SUPER BUSINESS POWER PACK 10kva 48v Hybride Solar Inverter

product: Remote Controlled gates D10 Turbo SMΔRT
name: Remote Controlled gates D10 Turbo SMΔRT
description: The D10 Turbo SMΔRT gate opener combines unrivalled speed (43m/min) with smart control for residential gates up to 250kg. It features a high 1500-cycle life and storage for multiple remotes, offering the pinnacle of convenience and safety.
meta_title: Remote Controlled gates D10 Turbo SMΔRT

name: Bollard Security system
description: Fixed security bollards are permanent, high-strength steel structures designed to prevent vehicle ramming attacks and protect pedestrians, storefronts, and critical infrastructure. A durable, low-maintenance security solution.

name: Body security Scanners
description: Advanced body scanners for enhanced security screening. Ideal for high-security environments like corporate HQs, airports, and events, they provide non-intrusive detection of metallic and non-metallic threats.

name: Hikvision DS-K1T804AMF(O-STD)
description: The Hikvision DS-K1T804AMF(O-STD) offers a range of configurable options to meet the specific requirements of access control and time attendance applications. With its compact dimensions and flexible feature set, it provides a versatile solution for securing various environments while ensuring ease of installation and integration.

name: Access Control Panel DS-K2804
description: A robust access control panel for managing security in commercial and residential buildings. It seamlessly integrates with card readers, biometric scanners, and door hardware for centralized entry control.

product: Face and Palm Recognition Reader -VF780 Zkteco
name: Face and Palm Recognition Reader -VF780 Zkteco
description: The ZKTeco VF780 is a cutting-edge biometric terminal designed for access control and time attendance applications. It offers advanced face and palm recognition capabilities, providing a highly secure and user-friendly experience.
meta_title: Face and Palm Recognition Reader -VF780 Zkteco

name: Zkteco F7-C Fingerprint/Card/Password Access Control
description: The ZKTeco F7-C is a highly reliable and efficient fingerprint reader designed for access control and time attendance applications. It provides robust security features and user-friendly operation, making it suitable for a variety of environments.

name: Face Recognition Access Control DS-K1T343MF
description: The Hikvision DS-K1T343MF is an advanced face recognition access control terminal designed for high-security applications. It combines facial recognition technology with multiple authentication methods to provide robust and reliable access control.

name: Full Height Turnstile Gate
description: Full-height turnstile gates are high-security access control solutions designed to manage the flow of people in various environments. They provide a robust and reliable method to ensure only authorized individuals can access restricted areas.

name: Swing Turnstiles
description: Swing turnstiles are modern, versatile access control solutions that provide secure and efficient management of pedestrian flow. These turnstiles are designed with swinging barriers that open to allow entry or exit, making them ideal for environments requiring a balance of security, aesthetics, and accessibility.

name: Estate Management Solution
description: Estate management enhances security, controls access, and manages traffic efficiently. It restricts unauthorized entry, integrates with surveillance for monitoring, and automates entry for residents using RFID and remote controls. This system simplifies visitor management, minimizes congestion, and requires low maintenance. It also collects data for better management and complies with safety standards, ensuring a safe and efficient estate environment.

name: Centurion Barrier Sector II
description: A heavy-duty vehicle barrier gate designed for high-traffic commercial and industrial applications. It offers reliable and fast operation for access control points.

name: Retractable Bollard
description: Retractable bollards are versatile and robust security devices designed to control vehicle access to sensitive or restricted areas while allowing temporary access when needed. These bollards can be lowered into the ground to permit vehicle passage and raised to block access, providing a flexible and effective access control solution.

name: Tyre Security Spikes
description: Tyre security spikes, also known as tire spikes, spike strips, or traffic spikes, are devices used to enforce directional traffic control and prevent unauthorized vehicle access. They are commonly employed in various security and traffic management scenarios to puncture the tires of vehicles attempting to move in the wrong direction or gain unauthorized entry.

name: Standalone Wifi Camera & Installation – v380
description: A cost-effective, single-channel Wi-Fi CCTV system starting at ₦30,000. Perfect for shops, offices, and homes, this V380 camera lets you monitor your property, kids, or staff remotely via your mobile phone using an internet service like MTN or Spectranet.

name: Triple Lens 4G Solar Camera – v380
description: An advanced 4G solar-powered PTZ camera with three lenses for a triple-screen preview. It features 12MP resolution, full-color night vision, human tracking, face recognition, and two-way audio. No Wi-Fi needed.

product: Dual Lens 4G Solar PTZ Camera – v380
name: Dual Lens 4G Solar PTZ Camera – v380
description: A powerful dual-lens 4G solar PTZ camera that provides comprehensive surveillance with pan, tilt, and zoom functions. Ideal for large outdoor areas without reliable Wi-Fi.
meta_title: Dual Lens 4G Solar PTZ Camera – v380

product: Basic 8 Channels CCTV System Plus Installation
name: Basic 8 Channels CCTV System Plus Installation
description: A complete 8-channel security system with 8 cameras and an 8-channel DVR. This package includes everything for a comprehensive home or office CCTV setup, with prices starting at ₦320,000 depending on site specifics.
meta_title: Basic 8 Channels CCTV System Plus Installation

name: Code 3 lightbar for security car
description: High-visibility LED light bar for security vehicles. Ensures your patrol cars are seen, providing effective warning and presence during security operations.

name: Xray Baggage scanners
description: High-performance X-ray baggage scanners for screening luggage, bags, and parcels. Essential for security at corporate buildings, airports, malls, and events to detect prohibited items.

name: portable Safe
description: A secure and durable portable safe box for protecting valuables, documents, and cash. Ideal for home, office, or hotel use, offering peace of mind.

name: Access control Smart Door locks
description: Advanced keyless entry systems combining access control panels with smart locking mechanisms. Ideal for commercial and high-security residential applications, offering centralized management and audit trails.

name: Smart Home keyless door lock
description: Modern, user-friendly keyless door locks for homes. Offer convenience with multiple access methods like fingerprint, PIN code, and smartphone app control, perfect for families and Airbnb rentals.

product: Smart solar remote control sliding gate machine
name: Smart solar remote control sliding gate machine
description: An efficient, solar-powered sliding gate motor. Perfect for locations with unreliable electricity, offering eco-friendly, remote-controlled access for residential and commercial gates.
meta_title: Smart solar remote control sliding gate machine

name: Digital Door lock
description: A sleek and modern digital door lock offering keyless convenience. Typically features keypad entry, making it a simple upgrade for enhanced home security without complex wiring.

name: Smart matt black Door locks
description: Stylish and secure smart locks finished in premium matt black. They combine high-end aesthetics with advanced features like fingerprint, code, and RFID access, perfect for modern interiors.

name: Smart glass Door Lock
description: Specialized electronic locks designed for glass doors (sliding or swing) in offices and commercial spaces. They provide secure access control while maintaining a professional, modern look.
